entities.name: PANGENOME
entities.description: The complete set of genes found within all individuals of a species, providing genomic variations in the cultivated gene pool

entities.name: GENOMIC VARIATIONS
entities.description: Differences in the DNA sequences among individuals or species

entities.name: CULTIVATED GENE POOL
entities.description: The total genetic diversity available within cultivated crop species

entities.name: SPECIES
entities.description: A group of living organisms consisting of similar individuals capable of exchanging genes

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Non-domesticated species that are genetically related to cultivated crops and possess diverse genetic stock

entities.name: GENETIC STOCK
entities.description: The available genetic diversity and hereditary material within a population or species

entities.name: GENUS
entities.description: A taxonomic rank used in the biological classification of species

entities.name: SUPER-PANGENOME
entities.description: A comprehensive pangenome developed by integrating accessions from all available species of a given genus

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of crops to improve yield, quality, or resilience

entities.name: CROP PANGENOMICS
entities.description: The study and application of pangenomes for the improvement of crops
